headline: Is Waters (WAT) Starting To Look Interesting After Recent Share Price Pressure?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Waters, at around US$289 per share, is starting to look interesting or if the price still feels rich for what you are getting. The stock has been under pressure, with returns of 4.2% over 7 days, 9.5% over 30 days, 24.3% year to date, and 21.5% over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on how the share price performance lines up with broader sentiment toward life sciences tools companies, and whether investors are reassessing the risk profile of more...
